name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN Stone Park, Illinois — EZPAWN is a full-service pawn shop in Las Vegas offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, firearms transactions, and d...
description_long:
EZPAWN is a branded pawn shop chain with a location at 1501 E. Charleston Blvd. in Las Vegas, NV. The store operates six days a week with extended hours (9am–7pm Monday through Saturday) and reduced Sunday hours (12pm–5pm), serving customers who need fast cash or are looking for discounted pre-owned goods. The Las Vegas location carries special inventory categories including firearms and auto loans, distinguishing it from standard EZPAWN branches.

The store offers a broad range of financial and retail services. On the lending side, customers can bring in items of value — electronics, jewelry, gold, firearms, and more — and receive a collateral-based pawn loan on the spot. EZPAWN also purchases gold and diamond jewelry outright, with staff who test precious metals for accurate pricing. For retail, the store sells pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25%–70% below new retail prices, with fresh inventory arriving daily. Flexible purchase options include a layaway program (10% down, monthly payments) and a "Take Today" buy-now-pay-later option through third-party financing partners for up to 12 months, subject to credit eligibility.

Several features set this location apart from independent pawn shops. The EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and reward points digitally and make online payments on extensions and layaways (not available in AZ, OR, or PA). An Instant Quote tool on the website allows customers to get an estimated value for electronics before visiting the store. The Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts, free stone replacement, and free cleaning. A Product Protection Plan covers electronics and A/V equipment for a one-time fee.

EZPAWN fills a clear niche for consumers who need immediate liquidity without a credit check, as pawn loans are secured entirely by the item's value rather than the borrower's creditworthiness. That said, pawn loan fees, interest rates, and redemption terms are not disclosed on the website — customers must visit in person to understand the actual cost of borrowing. The BNPL "Take Today" option also requires third-party credit approval, which may exclude some shoppers. Firearms appraisals and loan amounts are determined at each location's sole discretion, introducing variability.
address: 3116 W North Ave, Stone Park, IL 60165

company_info.headquarters: 3116 W North Ave, Stone Park, IL 60165

pros: EZ+ Rewards Program allows online management of pawns, layaways, and payments from any device
Instant Quote tool provides electronics valuations online before an in-store visit
Gold and diamond buying with on-site expert testing for accurate, fair pricing
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and easy monthly payments
Extended weekday and Saturday hours (9am–7pm) for working customers
Online shop with daily new arrivals of pre-owned merchandise at 25–70% off retail
Firearms accepted as collateral and purchased outright at select locations including this one
cons: Pawn loan fees, interest rates, and terms are not disclosed on the website — requires in-person inquiry
Online payments not available for customers in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania
"Take Today" BNPL requires third-party credit approval, excluding customers with poor credit
Firearms appraisal and loan amounts are at each location's sole discretion, with no published rate guidance
Sunday hours are significantly reduced (12pm–5pm only), limiting access on weekends
best_for: Consumers needing same-day cash who own electronics, jewelry, gold, or firearms
Shoppers looking for brand-name pre-owned goods at steep discounts without credit requirements
Individuals with no or poor credit history who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Sellers of gold, diamonds, or collectible firearms seeking immediate cash offers
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for consumers who need fast, no-credit-check cash by leveraging owned assets, or bargain hunters seeking discounted pre-owned electronics and jewelry. The primary caveat is opacity on loan costs — fees and APR are never published online, so borrowers must visit in person to evaluate whether the terms make financial sense before handing over their valuables.
services: Online shop with daily inventory updates
Take Today buy-now-pay-later (third-party, up to 12 months)
EZ+ Rewards Program (points on pawn, redeem, sell, purchase)
Auto loans (available at this Las Vegas location)
Product Protection Plans for electronics and A/V equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, stone replacement, cleaning)
